summary: Hi Grace — we completed a Spring 2026 billing correction on your account.

YOUR SPRING PAYMENTS (April forward): $285.00 (Apr 4) + $271.50 + $271.50 (Apr 30) + $701.00 (May 29) = $1,529.00. Only $181.00 remained before today's charge.

CORRECTION: Autopay on June 6 collected $724.00 ($362.00 per child). That was $543.00 more than the $181.00 still owed. We issued a $543.00 refund to your card today — $271.50 back on each of the two June 6 charges. Each charge is now $90.50, matching the correct remaining balance.
SPRING STATUS: Paid in full — $0.00 balance for Spring 2026.
Stripe refund references: re_3TfB5vGhVuNOnUs71v8z2bzV and re_3TfB5wGhVuNOnUs711TBWEZ4. Allow 5–10 business days for your bank to show the credits.
Reply if you have any questions. Thank you — ASA Brighton.
